title: Reactive Music - Sonic the Hedgehog
description: A Reactive Music pack with music from Sonic games
body:
This resource pack contains a selection of musical tracks from Sonic the Hedgehog franchise for the Reactive Music mod, picked to match the situations the player is in.

This pack features music from the following games:
- Sonic CD (Japan/Europe)
- Sonic 3D Blast / Sonic 3D Flickies' Island (Sega Saturn)
- Sonic Adventure
- Sonic Adventure 2
- Sonic Heroes
- Shadow the Hedgehog
- Sonic the Hedgehog (2006)
- Sonic Unleashed
- Sonic Colors
- Sonic Generations (Nintendo 3DS)
- Sonic Mania
- Sonic X Shadow Generations
